subject: [PATCH v2] x86/virt/tdx: Formalize SEAMCALL version encoding support

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Proposed a solution where the version is encoded as part of the function number, but was met with skepticism. Provided an alternative example where the version is explicitly set in the caller.

reviews.author: Dave Hansen
reviews.summary: Expressed skepticism about Kiryl's proposal and suggested an alternative solution where the version is carried around as a logical piece of RAX, to be assembled in one place.

2026-07-10.patch_summary: The patch aims to formalize SEAMCALL version encoding support in the x86/virt/tdx module, but Kiryl Shutsemau's proposal is met with skepticism and alternative solutions are presented.
